parts.title: Transcript
parts.annotated_transcript_html:
Speaker 1: You now have some time to look at the questions on your screen. Now answer the questions on your screen.

Speaker 2: Haboobs have many effects on the environments where they occur. A major effect is that pollution levels skyrocket during these dust storms and exacerbate breathing problems for people with asthma and other similar conditions, causing hospitals to be overwhelmed with people, many of them holiday makers.

Speaker 3: Many police forces have reported how Arizona was affected last summer as haboobs knocked out electricity and created traffic jams.

Speaker 2: Wind conditions made some trees fall onto cars and one elementary school bus, though thankfully there were no casualties.

Speaker 1: Due to the obvious dangers, many planes had to be grounded during times when there was any threat at all of a haboob taking place.
